results.title: Atrandi Biosciences Expands Leadership Team to Accelerate Global Adoption of Capsule-Based Single-Cell Technology
results.description: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Multiomics--Atrandi Biosciences announced the appointment of Sam Ropp, PhD, as Chief Commercial Officer and Susan Tousi as Chairman of the Board of Directors.

results.title: Atrandi Biosciences Expands Leadership Team to Accelerate Global Adoption of Capsule-Based Single-Cell Technology
results.description: Atrandi Biosciences, a life science tools company pioneering Semi-Permeable Capsule (SPC) technology for single-cell and multiomics research, today announced the appointment of Sam Ropp, PhD, as Chief Commercial Officer and Susan Tousi as Chairman of the Board of Directors. These additions strengthen Atrandi’s leadership team as the company accelerates global adoption of its capsule-based single-cell platform designed to enable complex, multi-step molecular workflows at single-cell resolution

results.title: Top Nanotechnology Stocks To Add to Your Watchlist – May 18th
results.description: Onto Innovation, NVE, Nano Dimension, and Clene are the five Nanotechnology stocks to watch today, according to MarketBeat’s stock screener tool. Nanotechnology stocks are shares of publicly traded companies that develop, use, or commercialize nanotechnology—materials, devices, or processes engineered at an extremely small scale, usually at the atomic or molecular level. results.title: Singaporeans say PayNow’s new name masking method is ‘still too weak’
results.description: SINGAPORE: Singapore’s deliberate modifications to PayNow show names have sparked concern on-line, with some customers arguing that the brand new masking system might expose extra private data than the nickname characteristic it’s changing. The Affiliation of Banks in Singapore (ABS) introduced on Apr 29 that PayNow nicknames for retail customers might be discontinued from Jun [...] The post Singaporeans say PayNow’s new name masking method is ‘still too weak’ appeared first on Asia Today .
